name: ANC_AVAIL_TYPE_BREAKS_VL
query: SELECT B.AVAILABILITY_TYPE_BREAK_ID, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.AVAILABILITY_TYPE_ID, T.NAME, B.BREAK_TYPE_CODE, B.BREAK_DURATION, B.BREAK_PAID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM ANC_AVAIL_TYPE_BREAKS_B B, ANC_AVAIL_TYPE_BREAKS_TL T WHERE B.AVAILABILITY_TYPE_BREAK_ID = T.AVAILABILITY_TYPE_BREAK_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
